name: Refactor: Extract Helper
prompt:
The file `seed/report.py` has repeated validation/formatting logic in three functions. Refactor it by:
1. Extracting the repeated email validation into a helper function `validate_email(email: str) -> bool`
2. Extracting the repeated name formatting into a helper function `format_name(first: str, last: str) -> str`
3. All three original functions must still work identically after refactoring

Write the refactored file to `workspace/report.py`.
